page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: NanopolishComp is a Python3 package for downstream analyses of Nanopolish output files
page_metadata.biotools__summary:
NanopolishComp is a Python3 package for downstream analyses of Nanopolish output files.
It is a companion package for Nanopolish.
page_metadata.galaxy__summary: NanopolishComp contains 2 modules. Eventalign_collapse collapses the raw file generated by nanopolish eventalign by kmers rather than by event. Freq_meth_calculate methylation frequency at genomic CpG sites from the output of nanopolish call-methylation.
page_metadata.galaxy__bio_tools_summary: NanopolishComp is a Python3 package for downstream analyses of Nanopolish output files.It is a companion package for Nanopolish.
